text: Could we have the bill, please?
We have some chicken and some rice.
Is there any soup? We do not have any fish.
How much soup do you want?
Good evening. Here is the menu. Are you ready to order, or do you need a few minutes?
Thank you. Is there any soup as a starter? And what do you recommend for the main course?
Yes, we have some tomato soup. For the main course, the grilled fish is excellent, with a side dish of rice.
Perfect. I will have the soup and the fish. How much is the main course?
It is eighteen euros. Would you like any dessert after that?
Yes, a little chocolate cake, please. And could we have the bill after dessert?

Good evening, and welcome to our restaurant. Let me tell you about tonight's specials. As a starter, we have a fresh tomato soup. There are not many tables left, so I am glad you have a reservation. For the main course, the chef recommends grilled fish with a side dish of rice and vegetables. We do not have much beef tonight, but we have some lovely chicken. For dessert, there is a little chocolate cake left, and it is wonderful. If you need anything, just call the waiter. Enjoy your meal.

I love trying restaurants when I travel. The first time I ate out in a new country, I did not know how to read the menu, so I just pointed at the pictures. Now I always ask the waiter a few questions before I order. I ask if there is any fish, how much the main course costs, and what side dish comes with it. A good tip is to order a starter to share. And at the end, I always leave a tip for good service. Eating out is one of my favorite parts of any trip.

First, Roberto reads the menu and asks the waiter a few questions. Then he orders a starter and a main course with a side dish. Next, the waiter brings the food and asks if he needs anything else. After that, Roberto enjoys his dessert and a cup of coffee. Finally, he asks for the bill and leaves a tip for the good service.
How many tables are free tonight?
How much soup would you like?
Could we have the bill, please?
What do you recommend for the main course?
Is there any soup as a starter?
How much is the main course?
For dessert, I would like a little cake.
